description: CORE is an Open University service that aggregates metadata and full text for open-access research papers from repositories, journals, and other providers. It provides searchable access to this corpus and related provider/journal/work metadata.
summary: CORE exposes two HTTP APIs for research-paper access: a documented public CORE API v3 and a legacy CORE API v2 documented by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
